name: McKesson Pharmacy Management API
what_it_does: McKesson Pharmacy Management REST API for retail, specialty, and long-term care pharmacy operations. Enables AI agents to manage prescription processing and adjudication workflow for retail pharmacy automation, handle medication dispensing and workflow queue management for pharmacy efficiency, access drug database and clinical decision support for medication safety, retrieve third-party claim submission and reconciliation for pharmacy revenue cycle, manage inventory management and drug procurement for pharmacy supply chain, handle controlled substance reporting and DEA compliance for regulatory management, access specialty pharmacy benefit verification and prior authorization for specialty medication management, retrieve patient medication adherence data for pharmacy care management programs, manage long-term care medication management and MARs for institutional pharmacy, and integrate McKesson pharmacy data with PBM networks, EHR, and health system platforms.
use_cases: Automating prescription adjudication from pharmacy workflow agents
Managing pharmacy inventory from procurement agents
Processing specialty prior authorizations from specialty pharmacy agents
Tracking controlled substance compliance from DEA reporting agents
not_for: Hospital inpatient pharmacy without retail/specialty pharmacy focus
Non-pharmacy businesses without drug dispensing operations
Consumer health apps without pharmacy system integration
best_when: A retail pharmacy chain, specialty pharmacy, or long-term care pharmacy using McKesson pharmacy management systems wants AI agents to automate prescription workflow, claims adjudication, inventory management, and compliance reporting.
avoid_when: PATIENT SAFETY RISK: Pharmacy dispensing automation must maintain NABP (National Association of Boards of Pharmacy) patient safety standards — automated prescription verification bypass creates dispensing error and patient harm risk. DEA e-prescribing for controlled substances (EPCS) requires DEA-compliant multi-factor authentication; automated EPCS workflow without DEA MFA creates EPCS violation. McKesson pharmacy products include multiple platforms (Pharmacy Plus, PXT, NRx, EnterpriseRx); API surface varies by platform.

auth.notes: McKesson pharmacy systems use OAuth 2.0 and API key. Access via McKesson partner program. No public webhooks. REST and HL7 NCPDP interfaces. Irving, Texas HQ (McKesson). Public (MCK NYSE). Founded 1833. Largest US healthcare supply chain company. McKesson pharmacy platforms: EnterpriseRx (retail chain), NRx (pharmacy management), Macro Helix (340B). Competes with PioneerRx, QS/1, and Rx30 for pharmacy management software.

pricing.notes: Irving, Texas. McKesson (MCK NYSE). Founded 1833. Largest US healthcare supply chain. EnterpriseRx, NRx, Macro Helix pharmacy platforms. 40,000+ pharmacies served. Competes with Rx30, PioneerRx, and QS/1 for independent pharmacy management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API credential; volume-based

known_agent_gotchas: PATIENT SAFETY RISK: Automated prescription verification bypass creates dispensing error risk; pharmacist final verification required by state pharmacy practice acts for all dispensed prescriptions
DEA EPCS MFA — automated e-prescribing for controlled substances must enforce DEA-compliant two-factor authentication; automated EPCS without required MFA creates DEA regulatory violation
NCPDP messaging — pharmacy claim adjudication uses NCPDP D.0 transaction format; REST API abstracts NCPDP but claim rejection handling requires NCPDP error code understanding
McKesson multi-platform complexity — McKesson has multiple pharmacy platforms (EnterpriseRx, NRx, Macro Helix); verify which McKesson platform serves the target pharmacy before integration
340B compliance — McKesson Macro Helix manages 340B pharmacy programs; automated 340B split-billing requires CMS-compliant eligible patient determination
No webhooks — McKesson pharmacy systems lack native event webhooks; prescription status and claim adjudication monitoring requires polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pharmacy management. HIPAA, SOC2, DEA. OAuth2/API key. US. Prescription and patient PHI.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pharmacy management. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Prescription and patient PHI.
